scope.intent: Audit Starships of the Galaxy feat parity without forcing vehicle/starship subsystem automation where the current system is not ready or where the source rule is better handled by the table.
scope.nonGoal: Do not build a starship construction economy/workbench from this audit. Starship Designer is intentionally metadata-only.

starshipDesigner.uiNote: Starship Designer is intentionally metadata-only. For ship design, rebuilds, and custom modifications, consult Starships of the Galaxy with your GM.
starshipDesigner.reason: The feat depends on open-ended ship design, long-form construction time/cost adjudication, GM benchmarking, and campaign-economy assumptions. Automating it would create false precision and a brittle parallel starship design subsystem.

expectedStarshipsEntries.name: Starship Tactics
expectedStarshipsEntries.notes: Should preserve the selected maneuver choice and expose it as metadata/resource support; full maneuver execution belongs to the starship maneuver subsystem.

expectedStarshipsEntries.name: Tactical Genius
expectedStarshipsEntries.notes: Future automation can hook natural-20 attack events to starship maneuver refresh when the maneuver resource is authoritative.

expectedStarshipsEntries.name: Tech Specialist
expectedStarshipsEntries.notes: Needed as prerequisite support for Starship Designer. Full Tech Specialist workflow remains separate UI/workbench scope.
